overview: Hanumante Exports – India is a professional, SEO-optimized export company website for an Indian agricultural and FMCG exporter. The site showcases fresh fruits, rice, spices, and pulses with full product details, certifications, and export logistics for international buyers in UAE, Saudi Arabia, Europe, UK, USA, and Singapore.
features: Product catalog with Fresh Fruits, Rice, Spices & Pulses
Export & Logistics page with Incoterms, ports, and certifications
SEO-optimized with meta tags and H1-H3 headings
About Us with family-owned business story
Why Choose Us section with trust signals
Trust badges for APEDA, FSSAI, IEC, GST certifications
